title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 43.
content:
There was an Old Man of Apulia,
    Whose conduct was very peculiar;
    He fed twenty sons,
    Upon nothing but buns,
    That whimsical Man of Apulia.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 43."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
